tasks.task: Introduce yourself (name, nationality, occupation)
tasks.example_hanzi: 你好！我叫Jason。我是美国人。我是老师。
tasks.example_pinyin: Nǐ hǎo! Wǒ jiào Jason. Wǒ shì Měiguó rén. Wǒ shì lǎoshī.
tasks.example_english: Hello! My name is Jason. I'm American. I'm a teacher.

tasks.task: Greet someone and ask how they are
tasks.example_hanzi: 嗨！最近怎么样？——还行，你呢？
tasks.example_pinyin: hāi! zuìjìn zěnmeyàng? ——hái xíng, nǐ ne?
tasks.example_english: Hey! How've you been? — Not bad, you?

tasks.task: Order food and drinks at a restaurant
tasks.example_hanzi: 我要一杯茶。他要一碗米饭。
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ yào yì bēi chá. Tā yào yì wǎn mǐfàn.
tasks.example_english: I want a cup of tea. He wants a bowl of rice.

tasks.task: Ask and tell the time
tasks.example_hanzi: 现在几点？现在三点。
tasks.example_pinyin: Xiànzài jǐ diǎn? Xiànzài sān diǎn.
tasks.example_english: What time is it now? It's three o'clock.

tasks.task: Ask how much something costs
tasks.example_hanzi: 这个多少钱？那个呢？太贵了。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhège duōshǎo qián? Nàge ne? Tài guì le.
tasks.example_english: How much is this? What about that one? Too expensive.

tasks.task: Take a taxi and give a destination
tasks.example_hanzi: 我去火车站。在这儿，谢谢。
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ qù huǒchēzhàn. Zài zhèr, xièxie.
tasks.example_english: I'm going to the train station. Right here, thanks.

tasks.task: Say you are sick and need help
tasks.example_hanzi: 我不舒服。我想去医院。你能帮我吗？
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ bù shūfu. Wǒ xiǎng qù yīyuàn. Nǐ néng bāng wǒ ma?
tasks.example_english: I don't feel well. I want to go to the hospital. Can you help me?

tasks.task: Ask where something is located
tasks.example_hanzi: 请问，银行在哪儿？在那儿，谢谢。
tasks.example_pinyin: Qǐngwèn, yínháng zài nǎr? Zài nàr, xièxie.
tasks.example_english: Excuse me, where is the bank? Over there, thanks.

tasks.task: Say what you like and don't like to eat
tasks.example_hanzi: 我喜欢吃中国菜。我不喜欢喝咖啡。
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan chī Zhōngguó cài. Wǒ bù xǐhuan hē kāfēi.
tasks.example_english: I like eating Chinese food. I don't like drinking coffee.

tasks.task: Make plans to meet a friend
tasks.example_hanzi: 你明天有时间吗？我们去喝咖啡吧。下午两点怎么样？
tasks.example_pinyin: Nǐ míngtiān yǒu shíjiān ma? Wǒmen qù hē kāfēi ba. Xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn zěnmeyàng?
tasks.example_english: Do you have time tomorrow? Let's go for coffee. How about 2pm?

tasks.task: Buy clothes and ask about sizes/colors
tasks.example_hanzi: 这件衣服有大的吗？我想要红色的。多少钱？
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhè jiàn yīfu yǒu dà de ma? Wǒ xiǎng yào hóngsè de. Duōshǎo qián?
tasks.example_english: Do you have this in a larger size? I want the red one. How much?

tasks.task: Respond to a compliment with appropriate modesty
tasks.example_hanzi: 你的中文说得很好！——哪里哪里，还差得远呢。
tasks.example_pinyin: Nǐ de Zhōngwén shuō de hěn hǎo! —— Nǎli nǎli, hái chà de yuǎn ne.
tasks.example_english: Your Chinese is great! —— Not at all, I still have a long way to go.

tasks.task: Check into a hotel
tasks.example_hanzi: 我要一个房间。住两天。有没有便宜一点的？
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ yào yí gè fángjiān. Zhù liǎng tiān. Yǒu méiyǒu piányi yìdiǎn de?
tasks.example_english: I want a room. Staying two nights. Do you have a cheaper one?

tasks.task: Ask for and understand simple directions
tasks.example_hanzi: 从这儿到地铁站怎么走？一直走，到路口往左走。
tasks.example_pinyin: Cóng zhèr dào dìtiězhàn zěnme zǒu? Yìzhí zǒu, dào lùkǒu wǎng zuǒ zǒu.
tasks.example_english: How do I get to the subway station from here? Go straight, turn left at the intersection.

tasks.task: Talk about your hobbies and interests
tasks.example_hanzi: 我喜欢看书和跑步。你呢？你喜欢做什么？
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan kànshū hé pǎobù. Nǐ ne? Nǐ xǐhuan zuò shénme?
tasks.example_english: I like reading and running. And you? What do you like to do?

tasks.task: Report a lost item
tasks.example_hanzi: 我的手机不见了。我是在出租车上丢的。你能帮我吗？
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ de shǒujī bú jiàn le. Wǒ shì zài chūzūchē shàng diū de. Nǐ néng bāng wǒ ma?
tasks.example_english: My phone is missing. I lost it in a taxi. Can you help me?

tasks.task: Describe the weather and dress accordingly
tasks.example_hanzi: 今天比昨天冷。你要多穿一点。别忘了带伞。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān lěng. Nǐ yào duō chuān yìdiǎn. Bié wàng le dài sǎn.
tasks.example_english: Today is colder than yesterday. You should dress warmer. Don't forget an umbrella.

tasks.task: Wish someone well during a holiday
tasks.example_hanzi: 新年快乐！祝你身体健康，万事如意！
tasks.example_pinyin: Xīnnián kuàilè! Zhù nǐ shēntǐ jiànkāng, wànshì rúyì!
tasks.example_english: Happy New Year! Wishing you good health and all the best!

tasks.task: Describe a past travel experience
tasks.example_hanzi: 去年我去了西安。我去过长城，也看了兵马俑。西安的小吃又便宜又好吃。
tasks.example_pinyin: Qùnián wǒ qùle Xī'ān. Wǒ qùguo Chángchéng, yě kànle Bīngmǎyǒng. Xī'ān de xiǎochī yòu piányi yòu hǎochī.
tasks.example_english: Last year I went to Xi'an. I've been to the Great Wall and saw the Terracotta Warriors. Xi'an's street food is both cheap and delicious.

tasks.task: Return a defective product and ask for a refund
tasks.example_hanzi: 这个东西坏了。我昨天才买的。我想换一个，或者退钱。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhège dōngxi huài le. Wǒ zuótiān cái mǎi de. Wǒ xiǎng huàn yí gè, huòzhě tuì qián.
tasks.example_english: This thing is broken. I just bought it yesterday. I'd like to exchange it, or get a refund.

tasks.task: Describe your job responsibilities
tasks.example_hanzi: 我在一家公司工作。我每天要写报告，还要和客人开会。工作越来越忙了。
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ zài yì jiā gōngsī gōngzuò. Wǒ měitiān yào xiě bàogào, hái yào hé kèrén kāihuì. Gōngzuò yuèláiyuè máng le.
tasks.example_english: I work at a company. Every day I need to write reports and have meetings with clients. Work is getting busier and busier.

tasks.task: Send a text message to make plans
tasks.example_hanzi: 你好！明天下午有空吗？我想请你吃饭。你把地址发给我吧。
tasks.example_pinyin: Nǐ hǎo! Míngtiān xiàwǔ yǒu kòng ma? Wǒ xiǎng qǐng nǐ chīfàn. Nǐ bǎ dìzhǐ fā gěi wǒ ba.
tasks.example_english: Hi! Are you free tomorrow afternoon? I'd like to treat you to dinner. Send me the address.

tasks.task: Explain how to get somewhere using public transport
tasks.example_hanzi: 从这儿坐地铁到西直门，然后换二号线。大概要半个小时。
tasks.example_pinyin: Cóng zhèr zuò dìtiě dào Xīzhímén, ránhòu huàn èr hào xiàn. Dàgài yào bàn gè xiǎoshí.
tasks.example_english: Take the subway from here to Xizhimen, then transfer to Line 2. It takes about half an hour.

tasks.task: Politely decline an invitation
tasks.example_hanzi: 谢谢你的邀请！不好意思，那天我有事。下次吧！
tasks.example_pinyin: Xièxie nǐ de yāoqǐng! Bù hǎo yìsi, nà tiān wǒ yǒu shì. Xià cì ba!
tasks.example_english: Thanks for the invitation! Sorry, I have something that day. Next time!

tasks.task: Describe symptoms to a doctor
tasks.example_hanzi: 我头疼，还有点发烧。从昨天开始的。除了头疼以外，嗓子也不舒服。
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ tóu téng, hái yǒudiǎn fāshāo. Cóng zuótiān kāishǐ de. Chúle tóu téng yǐwài, sǎngzi yě bù shūfu.
tasks.example_english: I have a headache and a slight fever. It started yesterday. Besides the headache, my throat is also uncomfortable.

tasks.task: Order delivery food using an app
tasks.example_hanzi: 我要点外卖。一份宫保鸡丁，不要太辣。请把餐送到三楼。
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ yào diǎn wàimài. Yí fèn gōngbǎo jīdīng, bú yào tài là. Qǐng bǎ cān sòng dào sān lóu.
tasks.example_english: I want to order delivery. One Kung Pao chicken, not too spicy. Please deliver to the third floor.

tasks.task: Add someone on WeChat and send a voice message
tasks.example_hanzi: 你有微信吗？我加你吧。我给你发一条语音。
tasks.example_pinyin: Nǐ yǒu Wēixìn ma? Wǒ jiā nǐ ba. Wǒ gěi nǐ fā yì tiáo yǔyīn.
tasks.example_english: Do you have WeChat? Let me add you. I'll send you a voice message.

tasks.task: Introduce yourself at a work meeting
tasks.example_hanzi: 大家好，我叫Jason。我是新来的同事。虽然我的中文还不太好，但是我会努力的。请大家多多关照。
tasks.example_pinyin: Dàjiā hǎo, wǒ jiào Jason. Wǒ shì xīn lái de tóngshì. Suīrán wǒ de Zhōngwén hái bú tài hǎo, dànshì wǒ huì nǔlì de. Qǐng dàjiā duōduō guānzhào.
tasks.example_english: Hello everyone, I'm Jason. I'm the new colleague. Although my Chinese isn't great yet, I'll work hard. Please look after me.

tasks.task: Explain why you were late with reasons
tasks.example_hanzi: 对不起，我迟到了。因为路上堵车，所以来晚了。下次我会早点出发。
tasks.example_pinyin: Duìbuqǐ, wǒ chídào le. Yīnwèi lùshang dǔchē, suǒyǐ lái wǎn le. Xià cì wǒ huì zǎodiǎn chūfā.
tasks.example_english: Sorry, I'm late. Because of traffic, I arrived late. Next time I'll leave earlier.

tasks.task: Negotiate rent with a landlord
tasks.example_hanzi: 这个房子不错，但是租金有点贵。如果便宜一点，我就租。一个月四千块怎么样？
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhège fángzi búcuò, dànshì zūjīn yǒudiǎn guì. Rúguǒ piányi yìdiǎn, wǒ jiù zū. Yí gè yuè sì qiān kuài zěnmeyàng?
tasks.example_english: This apartment is nice, but the rent is a bit expensive. If it's cheaper, I'll rent it. How about 4000 per month?

tasks.task: Discuss a Chinese holiday and its customs
tasks.example_hanzi: 中秋节的时候，一家人一边吃月饼一边赏月。对中国人来说，团圆很重要。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhōngqiūjié de shíhou, yì jiā rén yìbiān chī yuèbǐng yìbiān shǎng yuè. Duì Zhōngguó rén lái shuō, tuányuán hěn zhòngyào.
tasks.example_english: During Mid-Autumn Festival, families eat mooncakes while admiring the moon. For Chinese people, reunion is very important.

tasks.task: Write a short review of a restaurant online
tasks.example_hanzi: 这家饭店的菜不但好吃，而且价格不贵。虽然要等位，但是值得。推荐大家去试试。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhè jiā fàndiàn de cài búdàn hǎochī, érqiě jiàgé bú guì. Suīrán yào děng wèi, dànshì zhíde. Tuījiàn dàjiā qù shìshi.
tasks.example_english: This restaurant's food is not only delicious but also affordable. Although you have to wait for a table, it's worth it. I recommend everyone try it.
key_grammar: 不但...而且 not only...but also

tasks.task: Compare two products and make a recommendation
tasks.example_hanzi: 这两个手机都不错。第一个比第二个便宜，但是第二个拍照比较好。如果你喜欢拍照，就买第二个。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhè liǎng gè shǒujī dōu búcuò. Dì yī gè bǐ dì èr gè piányi, dànshì dì èr gè pāizhào bǐjiào hǎo. Rúguǒ nǐ xǐhuan pāizhào, jiù mǎi dì èr gè.
tasks.example_english: Both phones are good. The first one is cheaper, but the second one takes better photos. If you like photography, buy the second one.

tasks.task: Report a traffic accident
tasks.example_hanzi: 刚才这儿出了车祸。有人受伤了。请快点叫救护车。因为路被堵住了，所以请走别的路。
tasks.example_pinyin: Gāngcái zhèr chūle chēhuò. Yǒu rén shòushāng le. Qǐng kuài diǎn jiào jiùhùchē. Yīnwèi lù bèi dǔzhù le, suǒyǐ qǐng zǒu bié de lù.
tasks.example_english: There was a car accident here just now. Someone is injured. Please call an ambulance quickly. Because the road is blocked, please take another route.

tasks.task: Email a colleague about a schedule change
tasks.example_hanzi: 你好！明天的会议改时间了。因为经理有事，所以推迟到后天下午三点。既然时间变了，就请通知其他人。
tasks.example_pinyin: Nǐ hǎo! Míngtiān de huìyì gǎi shíjiān le. Yīnwèi jīnglǐ yǒu shì, suǒyǐ tuīchí dào hòutiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn. Jìrán shíjiān biàn le, jiù qǐng tōngzhī qítā rén.
tasks.example_english: Hi! Tomorrow's meeting has been rescheduled. Because the manager has something, it's postponed to the day after tomorrow at 3pm. Since the time has changed, please notify others.

tasks.task: Give a short presentation about your company
tasks.example_hanzi: 我们公司成立于2010年，以技术创新为核心。不管市场怎么变化，我们都坚持产品质量。目前，我们的客户遍布全国。
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒmen gōngsī chénglì yú èr líng yī líng nián, yǐ jìshù chuàngxīn wéi héxīn. Bùguǎn shìchǎng zěnme biànhuà, wǒmen dōu jiānchí chǎnpǐn zhìliàng. Mùqián, wǒmen de kèhù biànbù quánguó.
tasks.example_english: Our company was founded in 2010, with technology innovation as our core. Regardless of market changes, we maintain product quality. Currently, our clients are nationwide.

tasks.task: Discuss pros and cons of living abroad
tasks.example_hanzi: 在国外生活有好处也有坏处。即使语言不通，也能学到很多东西。与其抱怨困难，不如把它当作学习的机会。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zài guówài shēnghuó yǒu hǎochù yě yǒu huàichù. Jíshǐ yǔyán bùtōng, yě néng xuédào hěn duō dōngxi. Yǔqí bàoyuàn kùnnan, bùrú bǎ tā dàngzuò xuéxí de jīhuì.
tasks.example_english: Living abroad has both advantages and disadvantages. Even if there's a language barrier, you can learn a lot. Rather than complaining about difficulties, better to treat them as learning opportunities.
key_grammar: 与其...不如 rather than...better to

tasks.task: Explain a Chinese concept (like 面子) to a foreigner
tasks.example_hanzi: 在中国文化中，面子非常重要。他之所以那样做，是因为不想让对方丢面子。即使自己不方便，也要给别人留面子。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zài Zhōngguó wénhuà zhōng, miànzi fēicháng zhòngyào. Tā zhī suǒyǐ nàyàng zuò, shì yīnwèi bù xiǎng ràng duìfāng diū miànzi. Jíshǐ zìjǐ bù fāngbiàn, yě yào gěi biérén liú miànzi.
tasks.example_english: In Chinese culture, face is very important. The reason he did that is because he didn't want the other person to lose face. Even if it's inconvenient, you should save face for others.
key_grammar: 之所以...是因为 the reason...is because

tasks.task: Negotiate terms in a business meeting
tasks.example_hanzi: 关于价格的问题，我们希望能再商量一下。不管怎么说，双方都需要一个合理的方案。与其在价格上争执，不如一起想个双赢的办法。
tasks.example_pinyin: Guānyú jiàgé de wèntí, wǒmen xīwàng néng zài shāngliáng yíxià. Bùguǎn zěnme shuō, shuāngfāng dōu xūyào yí gè hélǐ de fāng'àn. Yǔqí zài jiàgé shàng zhēngzhí, bùrú yìqǐ xiǎng gè shuāngyíng de bànfǎ.
tasks.example_english: Regarding the pricing issue, we'd like to discuss further. No matter what, both sides need a reasonable plan. Rather than arguing over price, let's find a win-win solution together.
key_grammar: 与其...不如 rather than...better to

tasks.task: Summarize a news article you read
tasks.example_hanzi: 这篇文章说的是环境问题。它指出，即使我们现在采取行动，也需要很长时间才能看到效果。不管困难多大，都应该坚持下去。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng shuō de shì huánjìng wèntí. Tā zhǐchū, jíshǐ wǒmen xiànzài cǎiqǔ xíngdòng, yě xūyào hěn cháng shíjiān cái néng kàndào xiàoguǒ. Bùguǎn kùnnan duō dà, dōu yīnggāi jiānchí xiàqu.
tasks.example_english: This article is about environmental issues. It points out that even if we take action now, it will take a long time to see results. Regardless of how difficult it is, we should keep going.

tasks.task: Write a complaint to customer service online
tasks.example_hanzi: 你好，我在你们网站上买了一件衣服，但是收到的和图片不一样。我之所以选择你们，是因为之前的评价都很好。请尽快处理。
tasks.example_pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ zài nǐmen wǎngzhàn shàng mǎile yí jiàn yīfu, dànshì shōudào de hé túpiàn bù yíyàng. Wǒ zhī suǒyǐ xuǎnzé nǐmen, shì yīnwèi zhīqián de píngjià dōu hěn hǎo. Qǐng jǐnkuài chǔlǐ.
tasks.example_english: Hello, I bought clothes on your website, but what I received doesn't match the picture. The reason I chose you is because previous reviews were good. Please handle this promptly.
key_grammar: 之所以...是因为 the reason...is because

tasks.task: Explain an allergic reaction to medical staff
tasks.example_hanzi: 我对花生过敏。刚才不小心吃了含有花生的东西。即使只吃了一点点，也可能有严重反应。请赶快给我治疗。
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ duì huāshēng guòmǐn. Gāngcái bù xiǎoxīn chīle hányǒu huāshēng de dōngxi. Jíshǐ zhǐ chīle yì diǎndiǎn, yě kěnéng yǒu yánzhòng fǎnyìng. Qǐng gǎnkuài gěi wǒ zhìliáo.
tasks.example_english: I'm allergic to peanuts. I accidentally ate something with peanuts. Even if I only ate a tiny bit, there could be a serious reaction. Please treat me right away.

tasks.task: Discuss housing options with a real estate agent
tasks.example_hanzi: 我想找一个两室一厅的房子，离地铁站近一点的。不管是新房还是二手房都可以。以交通方便为主要条件。
tasks.example_pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng zhǎo yí gè liǎng shì yì tīng de fángzi, lí dìtiězhàn jìn yìdiǎn de. Bùguǎn shì xīnfáng háishì èrshǒufáng dōu kěyǐ. Yǐ jiāotōng fāngbiàn wéi zhǔyào tiáojiàn.
tasks.example_english: I'm looking for a two-bedroom apartment, close to the subway. Whether it's new or second-hand is fine. Convenient transportation is the main criterion.

tasks.task: Deliver a persuasive proposal at a board meeting
tasks.example_hanzi: 大公司都觉得压力大，何况我们这样的小公司。
tasks.example_pinyin: dà gōngsī dōu juéde yālì dà, hékuàng wǒmen zhèyàng de xiǎo gōngsī.
tasks.example_english: Even big companies feel the pressure, let alone a small company like ours.

tasks.task: Mediate a disagreement between friends
tasks.example_hanzi: 你们两个都冷静一下。他太忙了，以至于忘了你的生日。这件事固然让你难过，但他不是故意的。大家都是朋友，何况他已经道歉了。
tasks.example_pinyin: Nǐmen liǎng gè dōu lěngjìng yíxià. Tā tài máng le, yǐzhìyú wàng le nǐ de shēngrì. Zhè jiàn shì gùrán ràng nǐ nánguò, dàn tā bú shì gùyì de. Dàjiā dōu shì péngyou, hékuàng tā yǐjīng dàoqiàn le.
tasks.example_english: You two, calm down. He was so busy that he forgot your birthday. This matter admittedly makes you sad, but it wasn't intentional. We're all friends, and he's already apologized.

tasks.task: Discuss the evolution of a Chinese tradition
tasks.example_hanzi: 春节的庆祝方式越来越多样化了。传统习俗固然重要，但年轻人也创造了新的过年方式。就文化传承而言，关键是保持核心精神。
tasks.example_pinyin: Chūnjié de qìngzhù fāngshì yuèláiyuè duōyànghuà le. Chuántǒng xísú gùrán zhòngyào, dàn niánqīng rén yě chuàngzào le xīn de guònián fāngshì. Jiù wénhuà chuánchéng ér yán, guānjiàn shì bǎochí héxīn jīngshén.
tasks.example_english: The ways of celebrating Spring Festival are becoming more diverse. Traditional customs are admittedly important, but young people have also created new ways to celebrate. As far as cultural inheritance goes, the key is preserving the core spirit.

tasks.task: Write a thoughtful blog post about technology and society
tasks.example_hanzi: 手机给我们带来了便利，以至于我们已经离不开它了。这固然是科技进步的体现，但我们也应该反思：就人际关系而言，我们真的变得更近了吗？
tasks.example_pinyin: Shǒujī gěi wǒmen dàiláile biànlì, yǐzhìyú wǒmen yǐjīng lí bù kāi tā le. Zhè gùrán shì kējì jìnbù de tǐxiàn, dàn wǒmen yě yīnggāi fǎnsī: jiù rénjì guānxi ér yán, wǒmen zhēn de biàn de gèng jìn le ma?
tasks.example_english: Phones have brought us such convenience that we can no longer live without them. This is admittedly a sign of technological progress, but we should also reflect: as far as interpersonal relationships go, have we really gotten closer?

tasks.task: Analyze economic data and present conclusions
tasks.example_hanzi: 就数据而言，今年的增长率比去年低。经济放缓固然令人担忧，但并非不可逆转。消费者信心下降太快，以至于企业不敢投资。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jiù shùjù ér yán, jīnnián de zēngzhǎnglǜ bǐ qùnián dī. Jīngjì fànghuǎn gùrán lìngrén dānyōu, dàn bìngfēi bùkě nìzhuǎn. Xiāofèizhě xìnxīn xiàjiàng tài kuài, yǐzhìyú qǐyè bù gǎn tóuzī.
tasks.example_english: As far as the data shows, this year's growth rate is lower than last year's. The economic slowdown is admittedly concerning, but it's not irreversible. Consumer confidence dropped so fast that businesses don't dare invest.

tasks.task: File a detailed police report about a theft
tasks.example_hanzi: 东西全丢了，连护照都没了。
tasks.example_pinyin: dōngxi quán diū le, lián hùzhào dōu méi le.
tasks.example_english: Everything's gone — even my passport.

tasks.task: Write a formal recommendation letter
tasks.example_hanzi: 就工作能力而言，他是我见过最优秀的员工之一。他的成绩有目共睹，以至于其他部门都想和他合作。学历固然重要，但他的实际能力更令人佩服。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jiù gōngzuò nénglì ér yán, tā shì wǒ jiànguo zuì yōuxiù de yuángōng zhī yī. Tā de chéngjì yǒumùgòngdǔ, yǐzhìyú qítā bùmén dōu xiǎng hé tā hézuò. Xuélì gùrán zhòngyào, dàn tā de shíjì nénglì gèng lìngrén pèifú.
tasks.example_english: As far as work ability goes, he is one of the best employees I've seen. His achievements are obvious to all, to the extent that other departments all want to collaborate with him. Education admittedly matters, but his practical ability is even more impressive.

tasks.task: Discuss dietary choices and health philosophy
tasks.example_hanzi: 我已经在减少吃肉了，况且现在素食选择也多了。
tasks.example_pinyin: wǒ yǐjīng zài jiǎnshǎo chī ròu le, kuàngqiě xiànzài sùshí xuǎnzé yě duō le.
tasks.example_english: I've already been eating less meat, and besides, there are more vegetarian options now.

tasks.task: Write a formal complaint letter to a government agency
tasks.example_hanzi: 鉴于贵部门迟迟未回复我们的申请，我们不得不正式提出投诉。该申请自提交之日起已逾三个月，有关法规明确规定应在三十个工作日内答复。我们恳请贵部门尽快处理此事。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jiànyú guì bùmén chíchí wèi huífù wǒmen de shēnqǐng, wǒmen bùdébù zhèngshì tíchū tóusù. Gāi shēnqǐng zì tíjiāo zhī rì qǐ yǐ yú sān gè yuè, yǒuguān fǎguī míngquè guīdìng yīng zài sānshí gè gōngzuòrì nèi dáfù. Wǒmen kěnqǐng guì bùmén jǐnkuài chǔlǐ cǐ shì.
tasks.example_english: Given that your department has yet to respond to our application, we have no choice but to formally lodge a complaint. The application was submitted over three months ago, and relevant regulations stipulate a reply within thirty working days. We earnestly request that your department handle this matter promptly.

tasks.task: Give an academic presentation on your research findings
tasks.example_hanzi: 今天我向各位汇报一下我们的研究成果。本研究旨在探讨城市化对生态环境的影响。数据表明，快速城市化与空气质量下降之间存在显著相关性。鉴于此，我们提出以下三点建议。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ xiàng gèwèi huìbào yíxià wǒmen de yánjiū chéngguǒ. Běn yánjiū zhǐzài tàntǎo chéngshìhuà duì shēngtài huánjìng de yǐngxiǎng. Shùjù biǎomíng, kuàisù chéngshìhuà yǔ kōngqì zhìliàng xiàjiàng zhījiān cúnzài xiǎnzhù xiāngguānxìng. Jiànyú cǐ, wǒmen tíchū yǐxià sān diǎn jiànyì.
tasks.example_english: Today I will report our research findings. This study aims to explore the impact of urbanization on the ecological environment. Data indicates a significant correlation between rapid urbanization and declining air quality. In light of this, we propose the following three recommendations.

tasks.task: Conduct a media interview about your organization
tasks.example_hanzi: 感谢贵媒体的关注。就目前情况而言，我们公司正处于转型的关键阶段。这项技术固然面临挑战，但我们有信心克服。我可以补充一点：我们的研发投入较去年增长了百分之三十。
tasks.example_pinyin: Gǎnxiè guì méitǐ de guānzhù. Jiù mùqián qíngkuàng ér yán, wǒmen gōngsī zhèng chǔyú zhuǎnxíng de guānjiàn jiēduàn. Zhè xiàng jìshù gùrán miànlín tiǎozhàn, dàn wǒmen yǒu xìnxīn kèfú. Wǒ kěyǐ bǔchōng yìdiǎn: wǒmen de yánfā tóurù jiào qùnián zēngzhǎngle bǎifēnzhī sānshí.
tasks.example_english: Thank you for your media attention. As far as the current situation goes, our company is at a critical stage of transformation. This technology admittedly faces challenges, but we are confident we can overcome them. Let me add: our R&D investment increased by thirty percent compared to last year.

tasks.task: Deliver a toast at a formal banquet
tasks.example_hanzi: 各位嘉宾，非常荣幸能在此致辞。在座的各位对我们的项目给予了大力支持，我们铭感于心。唯有各方共同努力，方能取得今天的成绩。请各位举杯，为我们的友谊与合作干杯！
tasks.example_pinyin: Gèwèi jiābīn, fēicháng róngxìng néng zài cǐ zhìcí. Zàizuò de gèwèi duì wǒmen de xiàngmù jǐyǔle dàlì zhīchí, wǒmen mínggǎn yú xīn. Wéiyǒu gè fāng gòngtóng nǔlì, fāng néng qǔdé jīntiān de chéngjì. Qǐng gèwèi jǔbēi, wèi wǒmen de yǒuyì yǔ hézuò gānbēi!
tasks.example_english: Distinguished guests, it is a great honor to speak here. Everyone present has given tremendous support to our project, for which we are deeply grateful. Only through joint effort from all parties could we achieve today's results. Please raise your glasses — to our friendship and cooperation!

tasks.task: Analyze a piece of Chinese calligraphy or art for an audience
tasks.example_hanzi: 这幅作品的用笔极为讲究。就构图而言，虚实相生，留白恰到好处。书法的韵味不仅在于笔画本身，更在于气韵生动。这种意境，正是中国传统美学的精髓。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhè fú zuòpǐn de yòngbǐ jíwéi jiǎngjiū. Jiù gòutú ér yán, xūshí xiāngshēng, liúbái qiàdào hǎochù. Shūfǎ de yùnwèi bùjǐn zàiyú bǐhuà běnshēn, gèng zàiyú qìyùn shēngdòng. Zhè zhǒng yìjìng, zhèng shì Zhōngguó chuántǒng měixué de jīngsuǐ.
tasks.example_english: The brushwork in this piece is extremely refined. In terms of composition, emptiness and substance complement each other, with just the right amount of white space. The charm of calligraphy lies not only in the strokes themselves, but in the vitality of spirit. This kind of artistic mood is the very essence of traditional Chinese aesthetics.

tasks.task: Write a professional LinkedIn-style post about an industry trend
tasks.example_hanzi: 人工智能正在重塑各个行业。就我所在的领域而言，AI不仅提高了效率，而且改变了我们的思维方式。有人担忧AI将取代人类，但事实上，关键在于如何与AI协作。适应变化，方能立于不败之地。
tasks.example_pinyin: Réngōng zhìnéng zhèngzài chóngsù gège hángyè. Jiù wǒ suǒzài de lǐngyù ér yán, AI bùjǐn tígāole xiàolǜ, érqiě gǎibiànle wǒmen de sīwéi fāngshì. Yǒu rén dānyōu AI jiāng qǔdài rénlèi, dàn shìshí shàng, guānjiàn zàiyú rúhé yǔ AI xiézuò. Shìyìng biànhuà, fāng néng lì yú bú bài zhī dì.
tasks.example_english: AI is reshaping every industry. In my field, AI has not only improved efficiency but changed how we think. Some worry AI will replace humans, but in fact, the key is how to collaborate with AI. Only by adapting to change can we remain undefeated.

tasks.task: Negotiate with an insurance company about a claim
tasks.example_hanzi: 鉴于事故责任已经认定，贵公司应当按照合同条款进行赔偿。我方已提供了所有必要的证明材料。如果贵公司继续拖延，我方不得不通过法律途径解决。请在十个工作日内给予书面答复。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jiànyú shìgù zérèn yǐjīng rèndìng, guì gōngsī yīngdāng ànzhào hétong tiáokuǎn jìnxíng péicháng. Wǒ fāng yǐ tígōngle suǒyǒu bìyào de zhèngmíng cáiliào. Rúguǒ guì gōngsī jìxù tuōyán, wǒ fāng bùdébù tōngguò fǎlǜ tújìng jiějué. Qǐng zài shí gè gōngzuòrì nèi jǐyǔ shūmiàn dáfù.
tasks.example_english: Given that liability for the accident has been determined, your company should provide compensation in accordance with contract terms. We have submitted all necessary supporting documents. If your company continues to delay, we will have no choice but to pursue legal channels. Please provide a written response within ten business days.

tasks.task: Write a policy brief summarizing a social issue
tasks.example_hanzi: 就人口老龄化问题而言，当前形势不容乐观。数据表明，老年人口比例将在未来十年持续上升。这一趋势固然给社会保障体系带来压力，但也催生了新的经济机遇。鉴于此，本报告提出三项政策建议。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jiù rénkǒu lǎolínghuà wèntí ér yán, dāngqián xíngshì bùróng lèguān. Shùjù biǎomíng, lǎonián rénkǒu bǐlì jiāng zài wèilái shí nián chíxù shàngshēng. Zhè yī qūshì gùrán gěi shèhuì bǎozhàng tǐxì dàilái yālì, dàn yě cuīshēngle xīn de jīngjì jīyù. Jiànyú cǐ, běn bàogào tíchū sān xiàng zhèngcè jiànyì.
tasks.example_english: As far as the issue of population aging is concerned, the current situation is not optimistic. Data shows that the proportion of elderly people will continue to rise over the next decade. This trend admittedly puts pressure on the social security system, but also gives rise to new economic opportunities. In light of this, this report proposes three policy recommendations.

tasks.task: Analyze key clauses of a legal contract
tasks.example_hanzi: 本合同第七条规定，任何一方如违反保密义务，应承担相应的违约责任。就赔偿范围而言，包括但不限于直接损失及合理的律师费用。经双方协商一致，本条款自签署之日起生效。
tasks.example_pinyin: Běn hétong dì qī tiáo guīdìng, rènhé yī fāng rú wéifǎn bǎomì yìwù, yīng chéngdān xiāngyìng de wéiyuē zérèn. Jiù péicháng fànwéi ér yán, bāokuò dàn bù xiànyú zhíjiē sǔnshī jí hélǐ de lǜshī fèiyòng. Jīng shuāngfāng xiéshāng yízhì, běn tiáokuǎn zì qiānshǔ zhī rì qǐ shēngxiào.
tasks.example_english: Article 7 of this contract stipulates that if either party breaches confidentiality obligations, it shall bear corresponding liability for breach of contract. The scope of compensation includes but is not limited to direct losses and reasonable attorney fees. Upon mutual agreement, this clause takes effect from the date of signing.

tasks.task: Write a formal recommendation for a colleague's promotion
tasks.example_hanzi: 就工作表现而言，该同事在过去三年中始终表现优异。其所主导的项目不仅按时完成，且成果显著超出预期。经部门评估，其综合能力已达到高级岗位要求。鉴于上述情况，特此推荐其晋升。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jiù gōngzuò biǎoxiàn ér yán, gāi tóngshì zài guòqù sān nián zhōng shǐzhōng biǎoxiàn yōuyì. Qí suǒ zhǔdǎo de xiàngmù bùjǐn ànshí wánchéng, qiě chéngguǒ xiǎnzhù chāochū yùqī. Jīng bùmén pínggū, qí zōnghé nénglì yǐ dádào gāojí gǎngwèi yāoqiú. Jiànyú shàngshù qíngkuàng, tècǐ tuījiàn qí jìnshēng.
tasks.example_english: In terms of work performance, this colleague has consistently demonstrated excellence over the past three years. The projects they led were not only completed on time but yielded results significantly exceeding expectations. Following departmental evaluation, their overall capabilities meet senior-level requirements. In light of the above, I hereby recommend their promotion.

tasks.task: Write a literary essay analyzing a classical Chinese poem
tasks.example_hanzi: 李白此诗表面写月，实则抒发其漂泊之愁。'举头望明月，低头思故乡'一句，语言朴素而意境深远。其之所以千古传诵，在于以最简约的文字触及了人类共通的乡愁。就艺术手法而言，以景衬情，虚实交融。
tasks.example_pinyin: Lǐ Bái cǐ shī biǎomiàn xiě yuè, shízé shūfā qí piāobó zhī chóu. 'Jǔ tóu wàng míngyuè, dītóu sī gùxiāng' yī jù, yǔyán pǔsù ér yìjìng shēnyuǎn. Qí zhī suǒyǐ qiāngǔ chuánsòng, zàiyú yǐ zuì jiǎnyuē de wénzì chùjíle rénlèi gòngtōng de xiāngchóu. Jiù yìshù shǒufǎ ér yán, yǐ jǐng chèn qíng, xūshí jiāoróng.
tasks.example_english: Li Bai's poem ostensibly describes the moon but actually expresses his sorrow of wandering. The line 'Raising my head I gaze at the bright moon, lowering my head I think of home' uses plain language to achieve profound artistic resonance. The reason it has been recited for millennia is that the simplest words touch humanity's universal homesickness. In terms of artistic technique, scenery sets off emotion, and reality blends with imagination.

tasks.task: Write a detailed product specification document
tasks.example_hanzi: 本系统采用分布式架构，以确保高可用性和可扩展性。就性能指标而言，系统应在并发用户达到一万时仍保持响应时间低于两百毫秒。所有数据传输均须经过加密处理。如遇系统故障，应在三十分钟内自动切换至备用服务器。
tasks.example_pinyin: Běn xìtǒng cǎiyòng fēnbùshì jiàgòu, yǐ quèbǎo gāo kěyòngxìng hé kě kuòzhǎnxìng. Jiù xìngnéng zhǐbiāo ér yán, xìtǒng yīng zài bìngfā yònghù dádào yī wàn shí réng bǎochí xiǎngyìng shíjiān dīyú liǎng bǎi háomiǎo. Suǒyǒu shùjù chuánshū jūn xū jīngguò jiāmì chǔlǐ. Rú yù xìtǒng gùzhàng, yīng zài sānshí fēnzhōng nèi zìdòng qiēhuàn zhì bèiyòng fúwùqì.
tasks.example_english: This system adopts a distributed architecture to ensure high availability and scalability. In terms of performance metrics, the system should maintain a response time under 200 milliseconds even with 10,000 concurrent users. All data transmissions must be encrypted. In the event of system failure, automatic failover to a backup server should occur within thirty minutes.

tasks.task: Moderate a panel discussion on education reform
tasks.example_hanzi: 各位嘉宾，今天的议题是教育公平化改革。首先请张教授就目前的城乡差距发表看法。随后，李局长将从政策角度补充。如有不同意见，欢迎各位充分讨论。请大家控制发言时间，以便每位嘉宾都有机会表达观点。
tasks.example_pinyin: Gèwèi jiābīn, jīntiān de yìtí shì jiàoyù gōngpínghuà gǎigé. Shǒuxiān qǐng Zhāng jiàoshòu jiù mùqián de chéngxiāng chājù fābiǎo kànfǎ. Suíhòu, Lǐ júzhǎng jiāng cóng zhèngcè jiǎodù bǔchōng. Rú yǒu bùtóng yìjiàn, huānyíng gèwèi chōngfèn tǎolùn. Qǐng dàjiā kòngzhì fāyán shíjiān, yǐbiàn měi wèi jiābīn dōu yǒu jīhuì biǎodá guāndiǎn.
tasks.example_english: Distinguished panelists, today's topic is education equity reform. First, I invite Professor Zhang to share views on the current urban-rural gap. Then Director Li will supplement from a policy perspective. If there are differing opinions, all are welcome to discuss fully. Please keep your remarks within time so every panelist has a chance to express their views.

tasks.task: Deliver a eulogy at a memorial service
tasks.example_hanzi: 今天我们怀着沉痛的心情缅怀王老师。他毕生致力于教育事业，桃李满天下。他曾说过：'教育不是灌满一桶水，而是点燃一把火。'他的精神将永远激励着我们。愿他安息。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen huáizhe chéntòng de xīnqíng miǎnhuái Wáng lǎoshī. Tā bìshēng zhìlì yú jiàoyù shìyè, táolǐ mǎn tiānxià. Tā céng shuōguò: 'Jiàoyù bú shì guàn mǎn yī tǒng shuǐ, ér shì diǎnrán yī bǎ huǒ.' Tā de jīngshén jiāng yǒngyuǎn jīlìzhe wǒmen. Yuàn tā ānxī.
tasks.example_english: Today we gather with heavy hearts to remember Teacher Wang. He devoted his entire life to education, with students spread across the world. He once said: 'Education is not filling a bucket, but lighting a fire.' His spirit will forever inspire us. May he rest in peace.

tasks.task: Draft a formal appeal against an administrative decision
tasks.example_hanzi: 就贵局于2026年1月15日作出的行政处罚决定（编号：2026-045），本人依法提出行政复议申请。本人认为该决定事实认定不清，适用法律不当。经审查全部证据，上述处罚缺乏充分依据。恳请上级机关依法予以撤销。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jiù guì jú yú èr líng èr liù nián yī yuè shíwǔ rì zuòchū de xíngzhèng chǔfá juédìng (biānhào: èr líng èr liù líng sì wǔ), běnrén yīfǎ tíchū xíngzhèng fùyì shēnqǐng. Běnrén rènwéi gāi juédìng shìshí rèndìng bù qīng, shìyòng fǎlǜ bùdàng. Jīng shěnchá quánbù zhèngjù, shàngshù chǔfá quēfá chōngfèn yījù. Kěnqǐng shàngjí jīguān yīfǎ yǔyǐ chèxiāo.
tasks.example_english: Regarding the administrative penalty decision made by your bureau on January 15, 2026 (No. 2026-045), I hereby file an application for administrative reconsideration in accordance with the law. I believe the decision is based on unclear facts and improper application of law. Upon review of all evidence, the aforementioned penalty lacks sufficient basis. I respectfully request the higher authority to revoke it in accordance with the law.

tasks.task: Write a formal letter of resignation with grace
tasks.example_hanzi: 经过慎重考虑，我决定辞去目前的职务。在公司任职期间，我获得了宝贵的成长机会，对此深表感谢。尤其感谢团队同事多年来的支持与合作。我将在离职前妥善完成工作交接，以确保业务的连续性。
tasks.example_pinyin: Jīngguò shènzhòng kǎolǜ, wǒ juédìng cíqù mùqián de zhíwù. Zài gōngsī rènzhí qījiān, wǒ huòdéle bǎoguì de chéngzhǎng jīhuì, duì cǐ shēn biǎo gǎnxiè. Yóuqí gǎnxiè tuánduì tóngshì duō nián lái de zhīchí yǔ hézuò. Wǒ jiāng zài lízhí qián tuǒshàn wánchéng gōngzuò jiāojiē, yǐ quèbǎo yèwù de liánxùxìng.
tasks.example_english: After careful consideration, I have decided to resign from my current position. During my tenure at the company, I gained valuable growth opportunities, for which I am deeply grateful. I especially thank my team colleagues for years of support and cooperation. I will properly complete the work handover before departing to ensure business continuity.

tasks.task: Draft a diplomatic communique on bilateral trade
tasks.example_hanzi: 双方重申致力于推动自由贸易，反对一切形式的贸易保护主义。两国一致同意，在互利共赢的基础上，进一步深化经贸合作。鉴于全球经济形势的不确定性，双方将加强宏观经济政策协调，共同维护多边贸易体制的稳定性。
tasks.example_pinyin: Shuāngfāng chóngshēn zhìlì yú tuīdòng zìyóu màoyì, fǎnduì yīqiè xíngshì de màoyì bǎohù zhǔyì. Liǎng guó yīzhì tóngyì, zài hùlì gòngyíng de jīchǔ shàng, jìnyībù shēnhuà jīngmào hézuò. Jiànyú quánqiú jīngjì xíngshì de bù quèdìngxìng, shuāngfāng jiāng jiāqiáng hóngguān jīngjì zhèngcè xiétiáo, gòngtóng wéihù duōbiān màoyì tǐzhì de wěndìngxìng.
tasks.example_english: Both sides reaffirm their commitment to promoting free trade and opposing all forms of trade protectionism. The two countries unanimously agree to further deepen economic and trade cooperation on the basis of mutual benefit. Given the uncertainty of the global economic situation, both sides will strengthen macroeconomic policy coordination and jointly safeguard the stability of the multilateral trading system.

tasks.task: Defend a doctoral thesis before an academic committee
tasks.example_hanzi: 本研究所采用的方法论兼顾了定性与定量两种研究范式。就核心论点而言，本文提出：社会资本的积累与制度信任之间存在非线性关系。尽管样本存在一定的局限性，但研究结果仍具有理论与实践的双重价值。针对委员会提出的关于变量选取的问题，我做如下回应。
tasks.example_pinyin: Běn yánjiū suǒ cǎiyòng de fāngfǎlùn jiāngùle dìngxìng yǔ dìngliàng liǎng zhǒng yánjiū fànshì. Jiù héxīn lùndiǎn ér yán, běnwén tíchū: shèhuì zīběn de jīlěi yǔ zhìdù xìnrèn zhījiān cúnzài fēi xiànxìng guānxi. Jǐnguǎn yàngběn cúnzài yīdìng de júxiànxìng, dàn yánjiū jiéguǒ réng jùyǒu lǐlùn yǔ shíjiàn de shuāngchóng jiàzhí. Zhēnduì wěiyuánhuì tíchū de guānyú biànliàng xuǎnqǔ de wèntí, wǒ zuò rúxià huíyìng.
tasks.example_english: The methodology adopted in this study incorporates both qualitative and quantitative research paradigms. As for the core argument, this paper proposes that there exists a nonlinear relationship between the accumulation of social capital and institutional trust. Although the sample has certain limitations, the findings still carry dual theoretical and practical value. In response to the committee's question regarding variable selection, I offer the following.

tasks.task: Write a critical literary review of a contemporary novel
tasks.example_hanzi: 这部小说以看似平静的叙事，揭示了转型时代个体命运的深层撕裂。作者以冷峻的笔触描绘了一幅底层社会的众生相。就叙事手法而言，多重视角的交叉运用使文本呈现出复调式的张力。其文学价值不在于对现实的简单摹写，而在于对人性幽微之处的深刻洞察。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zhè bù xiǎoshuō yǐ kànsì píngjìng de xùshì, jiēshìle zhuǎnxíng shídài gètǐ mìngyùn de shēncéng sīliè. Zuòzhě yǐ lěngjùn de bǐchù miáohuìle yī fú dǐcéng shèhuì de zhòngshēng xiàng. Jiù xùshì shǒufǎ ér yán, duōchóng shìjiǎo de jiāochā yùnyòng shǐ wénběn chéngxiàn chū fùdiào shì de zhānglì. Qí wénxué jiàzhí bú zàiyú duì xiànshí de jiǎndān móxiě, ér zàiyú duì rénxìng yōuwēi zhī chù de shēnkè dòngchá.
tasks.example_english: This novel, through seemingly calm narration, reveals the deep fractures in individual fates during an era of transformation. The author uses austere prose to paint a portrait of life among the underclass. In terms of narrative technique, the intersecting use of multiple perspectives creates polyphonic tension in the text. Its literary value lies not in simple mimesis of reality, but in its profound insight into the subtleties of human nature.

tasks.task: Deliver a keynote speech at an international forum
tasks.example_hanzi: 女士们、先生们，本次论坛旨在探讨人类共同面临的挑战。当今世界正处于百年未有之大变局。各国唯有携手合作，方能应对气候变化、公共卫生、数字治理等全球性议题。我坚信，对话胜于对抗，合作优于孤立。让我们以开放包容的心态，共同构建人类命运共同体。
tasks.example_pinyin: Nǚshìmen, xiānshēngmen, běn cì lùntán zhǐzài tàntǎo rénlèi gòngtóng miànlín de tiǎozhàn. Dāngjīn shìjiè zhèng chǔyú bǎi nián wèi yǒu zhī dà biànjú. Gè guó wéiyǒu xiéshǒu hézuò, fāng néng yìngduì qìhòu biànhuà, gōnggòng wèishēng, shùzì zhìlǐ děng quánqiú xìng yìtí. Wǒ jiānxìn, duìhuà shèng yú duìkàng, hézuò yōu yú gūlì. Ràng wǒmen yǐ kāifàng bāoróng de xīntài, gòngtóng gòujiàn rénlèi mìngyùn gòngtóngtǐ.
tasks.example_english: Ladies and gentlemen, this forum aims to discuss the challenges facing all of humanity. The world today is undergoing changes unseen in a century. Only by joining hands can nations address climate change, public health, digital governance, and other global issues. I firmly believe that dialogue prevails over confrontation and cooperation surpasses isolation. Let us, with open and inclusive minds, jointly build a community of shared future for mankind.

tasks.task: Write a white paper on AI ethics and governance
tasks.example_hanzi: 人工智能技术的迅猛发展为社会带来了前所未有的机遇与挑战。本白皮书旨在构建一套可操作的AI伦理治理框架。我们认为，算法透明度、数据隐私保护以及人类最终决策权是三项不可或缺的基本原则。任何技术的发展都不应以牺牲人的尊严为代价。
tasks.example_pinyin: Réngōng zhìnéng jìshù de xùnměng fāzhǎn wèi shèhuì dàiláile qiánsuǒwèiyǒu de jīyù yǔ tiǎozhàn. Běn báipíshū zhǐzài gòujiàn yī tào kě cāozuò de AI lúnlǐ zhìlǐ kuàngjià. Wǒmen rènwéi, suànfǎ tòumíngdù, shùjù yǐnsī bǎohù yǐjí rénlèi zuìzhōng juécèquán shì sān xiàng bùkě huòquē de jīběn yuánzé. Rènhé jìshù de fāzhǎn dōu bù yīng yǐ xīshēng rén de zūnyán wéi dàijià.
tasks.example_english: The rapid development of AI technology has brought unprecedented opportunities and challenges to society. This white paper aims to build an actionable AI ethics governance framework. We believe that algorithmic transparency, data privacy protection, and ultimate human decision-making authority are three indispensable fundamental principles. No technological development should come at the cost of human dignity.

tasks.task: Present oral arguments in a court hearing
tasks.example_hanzi: 尊敬的审判长，就本案事实而言，被告的行为构成了明显的侵权。原告已提交充分的证据证明损害的存在及因果关系。被告方所称的不可抗力抗辩不能成立，因为其未能证明已履行合理的注意义务。综上所述，恳请法庭依法支持原告的全部诉讼请求。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zūnjìng de shěnpànzhǎng, jiù běn àn shìshí ér yán, bèigào de xíngwéi gòuchéngle míngxiǎn de qīnquán. Yuángào yǐ tíjiāo chōngfèn de zhèngjù zhèngmíng sǔnhài de cúnzài jí yīnguǒ guānxi. Bèigào fāng suǒ chēng de bùkě kànglì kàngbiàn bù néng chénglì, yīnwèi qí wèi néng zhèngmíng yǐ lǚxíng hélǐ de zhùyì yìwù. Zōng shàng suǒ shù, kěnqǐng fǎtíng yīfǎ zhīchí yuángào de quánbù sùsòng qǐngqiú.
tasks.example_english: Honorable presiding judge, as far as the facts of this case are concerned, the defendant's actions constitute clear infringement. The plaintiff has submitted sufficient evidence to prove the existence of damages and causation. The defendant's force majeure defense cannot stand, as they failed to prove they fulfilled reasonable duty of care. In summary, I respectfully request the court to support the plaintiff's claims in full accordance with the law.

tasks.task: Write an editorial on media responsibility in the digital age
tasks.example_hanzi: 在信息爆炸的时代，媒体肩负着比以往任何时候都更为沉重的社会责任。新闻报道不应沦为流量竞争的工具，而应坚守真实性与客观性的底线。就舆论引导而言，负责任的媒体既要敢于揭露问题，也要避免煽动情绪。唯有如此，公众的知情权与社会的理性讨论空间方能得到保障。
tasks.example_pinyin: Zài xìnxī bàozhà de shídài, méitǐ jiānfùzhe bǐ yǐwǎng rènhé shíhòu dōu gèng wéi chénzhòng de shèhuì zérèn. Xīnwén bàodào bù yīng lúnwéi liúliàng jìngzhēng de gōngjù, ér yīng jiānshǒu zhēnshíxìng yǔ kèguānxìng de dǐxiàn. Jiù yúlùn yǐndǎo ér yán, fùzérèn de méitǐ jì yào gǎnyú jiēlù wèntí, yě yào bìmiǎn shāndòng qíngxù. Wéiyǒu rúcǐ, gōngzhòng de zhīqíngquán yǔ shèhuì de lǐxìng tǎolùn kōngjiān fāng néng dédào bǎozhàng.
tasks.example_english: In an age of information explosion, media bears a heavier social responsibility than ever before. News reporting should not devolve into a tool for traffic competition, but should uphold the baseline of truthfulness and objectivity. In terms of shaping public opinion, responsible media must both dare to expose problems and avoid inciting emotions. Only thus can the public's right to know and society's space for rational discourse be safeguarded.

tasks.task: Write a philosophical personal essay reflecting on identity and belonging
tasks.example_hanzi: 漂泊异乡多年，'故乡'二字于我而言早已不是一个地理概念，而是一种精神上的归属。每当夜深人静，记忆如水般渗透进意识的每一道缝隙。我们终其一生所追寻的，或许不过是一个可以安放灵魂的所在。正如百川东到海，所有的流浪终将汇入某处静谧的港湾。
tasks.example_pinyin: Piāobó yìxiāng duō nián, 'gùxiāng' èr zì yú wǒ ér yán zǎo yǐ bú shì yí gè dìlǐ gàiniàn, ér shì yī zhǒng jīngshén shàng de guīshǔ. Měi dāng yè shēn rén jìng, jìyì rú shuǐ bān shèntòu jìn yìshí de měi yī dào fèngxì. Wǒmen zhōng qí yīshēng suǒ zhuīxún de, huòxǔ búguò shì yí gè kěyǐ ānfàng línghún de suǒzài. Zhèng rú bǎichuān dōng dào hǎi, suǒyǒu de liúlàng zhōng jiāng huìrù mǒu chù jìngmì de gǎngwān.
tasks.example_english: After years of wandering far from home, the word 'hometown' has long ceased to be a geographical concept for me — it is a spiritual sense of belonging. In the deep quiet of night, memories seep like water into every crevice of consciousness. What we seek throughout our entire lives is perhaps nothing more than a place to rest our souls. Just as all rivers flow east to the sea, all wandering will eventually converge in some tranquil harbor.
